verses.latin_vulgate: Et factus est sermo Domini ad me, dicens :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִ֥י דְבַר־יְהֹוָ֖ה אֵלַ֥י לֵאמֹֽר׃
verses.king_james: The word of the Lord came again unto me, saying,

verses.latin_vulgate: Fili hominis, dic principi Tyri :   Hæc dicit Dominus Deus :  Eo quod elevatum est cor tuum,  et dixisti : Deus ego sum,  et in cathedra Dei sedi in corde maris,  cum sis homo, et non deus :  et dedisti cor tuum quasi cor Dei :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בֶּן־אָדָ֡ם אֱמֹר֩ לִנְגִ֨יד צֹ֜ר כֹּה־אָמַ֣ר ׀ אֲדֹנָ֣י יֱהֹוִ֗ה יַ֣עַן גָּבַ֤הּ לִבְּךָ֙ וַתֹּ֙אמֶר֙ אֵ֣ל אָ֔נִי מוֹשַׁ֧ב אֱלֹהִ֛ים יָשַׁ֖בְתִּי בְּלֵ֣ב יַמִּ֑ים וְאַתָּ֤ה אָדָם֙ וְֽלֹא־אֵ֔ל וַתִּתֵּ֥ן לִבְּךָ֖ כְּלֵ֥ב אֱלֹהִֽים׃
verses.king_james: Son of man, say unto the prince of Tyrus, Thus saith the Lord God; Because thine heart is lifted up, and thou hast said, I am a God, I sit in the seat of God, in the midst of the seas; yet thou art a man, and not God, though thou set thine heart as the heart of God:

verses.latin_vulgate: ecce sapientior es tu Daniele :  omne secretum non est absconditum a te :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הִנֵּ֥ה חָכָ֛ם אַתָּ֖ה (מדנאל) [מִדָּֽנִיֵּ֑אל] כׇּל־סָת֖וּם לֹ֥א עֲמָמֽוּךָ׃
verses.king_james: Behold, thou art wiser than Daniel; there is no secret that they can hide from thee:

verses.latin_vulgate: in sapientia et prudentia tua fecisti tibi fortitudinem,  et acquisisti aurum et argentum in thesauris tuis :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּחׇכְמָֽתְךָ֙ וּבִתְבוּנָ֣תְךָ֔ עָשִׂ֥יתָ לְּךָ֖ חָ֑יִל וַתַּ֛עַשׂ זָהָ֥ב וָכֶ֖סֶף בְּאוֹצְרוֹתֶֽיךָ׃
verses.king_james: With thy wisdom and with thine understanding thou hast gotten thee riches, and hast gotten gold and silver into thy treasures:

verses.latin_vulgate: in multitudine sapientiæ tuæ,  et in negotiatione tua multiplicasti tibi fortitudinem,  et elevatum est cor tuum in robore tuo :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּרֹ֧ב חׇכְמָתְךָ֛ בִּרְכֻלָּתְךָ֖ הִרְבִּ֣יתָ חֵילֶ֑ךָ וַיִּגְבַּ֥הּ לְבָבְךָ֖ בְּחֵילֶֽךָ׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: By thy great wisdom and by thy traffick hast thou increased thy riches, and thine heart is lifted up because of thy riches:

verses.latin_vulgate: propterea hæc dicit Dominus Deus :  Eo quod elevatum est cor tuum quasi cor dei,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לָכֵ֕ן כֹּ֥ה אָמַ֖ר אֲדֹנָ֣י יֱהֹוִ֑ה יַ֛עַן תִּתְּךָ֥ אֶת־לְבָבְךָ֖ כְּלֵ֥ב אֱלֹהִֽים׃
verses.king_james: Therefore thus saith the Lord God; Because thou hast set thine heart as the heart of God;

verses.latin_vulgate: idcirco ecce ego adducam super te alienos,  robustissimos gentium :  et nudabunt gladios suos super pulchritudinem sapientiæ tuæ,  et polluent decorem tuum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לָכֵ֗ן הִנְנִ֨י מֵבִ֤יא עָלֶ֙יךָ֙ זָרִ֔ים עָרִיצֵ֖י גּוֹיִ֑ם וְהֵרִ֤יקוּ חַרְבוֹתָם֙ עַל־יְפִ֣י חׇכְמָתֶ֔ךָ וְחִלְּל֖וּ יִפְעָתֶֽךָ׃
verses.king_james: Behold, therefore I will bring strangers upon thee, the terrible of the nations: and they shall draw their swords against the beauty of thy wisdom, and they shall defile thy brightness.

verses.latin_vulgate: Interficient, et detrahent te :  et morieris in interitu occisorum in corde maris.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לַשַּׁ֖חַת יוֹרִד֑וּךָ וָמַ֛תָּה מְמוֹתֵ֥י חָלָ֖ל בְּלֵ֥ב יַמִּֽים׃
verses.king_james: They shall bring thee down to the pit, and thou shalt die the deaths of them that are slain in the midst of the seas.

verses.latin_vulgate: Numquid dicens loqueris : Deus ego sum,  coram interficientibus te,  cum sis homo, et non deus,  in manu occidentium te ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הֶאָמֹ֤ר תֹּאמַר֙ אֱלֹהִ֣ים אָ֔נִי לִפְנֵ֖י הֹרְגֶ֑ךָ וְאַתָּ֥ה אָדָ֛ם וְלֹא־אֵ֖ל בְּיַ֥ד מְחַלְלֶֽיךָ׃
verses.king_james: Wilt thou yet say before him that slayeth thee, I am God? but thou shalt be a man, and no God, in the hand of him that slayeth thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: Morte incircumcisorum morieris in manu alienorum,  quia ego locutus sum, ait Dominus Deus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מוֹתֵ֧י עֲרֵלִ֛ים תָּמ֖וּת בְּיַד־זָרִ֑ים כִּ֚י אֲנִ֣י דִבַּ֔רְתִּי נְאֻ֖ם אֲדֹנָ֥י יֱהֹוִֽה׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: Thou shalt die the deaths of the uncircumcised by the hand of strangers: for I have spoken it, saith the Lord God.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et factus est sermo Domini ad me, dicens : Fili hominis, leva planctum super regem Tyri,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִ֥י דְבַר־יְהֹוָ֖ה אֵלַ֥י לֵאמֹֽר׃
verses.king_james: Moreover the word of the Lord came unto me, saying,

verses.latin_vulgate: et dices ei :   Hæc dicit Dominus Deus :  Tu signaculum similitudinis,  plenus sapientia, et perfectus decore.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בֶּן־אָדָ֕ם שָׂ֥א קִינָ֖ה עַל־מֶ֣לֶךְ צ֑וֹר וְאָמַ֣רְתָּ לּ֗וֹ כֹּ֤ה אָמַר֙ אֲדֹנָ֣י יֱהֹוִ֔ה אַתָּה֙ חוֹתֵ֣ם תׇּכְנִ֔ית מָלֵ֥א חׇכְמָ֖ה וּכְלִ֥יל יֹֽפִי׃
verses.king_james: Son of man, take up a lamentation upon the king of Tyrus, and say unto him, Thus saith the Lord God; Thou sealest up the sum, full of wisdom, and perfect in beauty.

verses.latin_vulgate: In deliciis paradisi Dei fuisti :  omnis lapis pretiosus operimentum tuum,  sardius, topazius, et jaspis,  chrysolithus, et onyx, et beryllus,  sapphirus, et carbunculus, et smaragdus :  aurum, opus decoris tui :  et foramina tua, in die qua conditus es, præparata sunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּעֵ֨דֶן גַּן־אֱלֹהִ֜ים הָיִ֗יתָ כׇּל־אֶ֨בֶן יְקָרָ֤ה מְסֻכָתֶ֙ךָ֙ אֹ֣דֶם פִּטְדָ֞ה וְיָהֲלֹ֗ם תַּרְשִׁ֥ישׁ שֹׁ֙הַם֙ וְיָ֣שְׁפֵ֔ה סַפִּ֣יר נֹ֔פֶךְ וּבָרְקַ֖ת וְזָהָ֑ב מְלֶ֨אכֶת תֻּפֶּ֤יךָ וּנְקָבֶ֙יךָ֙ בָּ֔ךְ בְּי֥וֹם הִבָּרַאֲךָ֖ כּוֹנָֽנוּ׃
verses.king_james: Thou hast been in Eden the garden of God; every precious stone was thy covering, the sardius, topaz, and the diamond, the beryl, the onyx, and the jasper, the sapphire, the emerald, and the carbuncle, and gold: the workmanship of thy tabrets and of thy pipes was prepared in thee in the day that thou wast created.

verses.latin_vulgate: Tu cherub extentus, et protegens,  et posui te in monte sancto Dei :  in medio lapidum ignitorum ambulasti,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַ֨תְּ־כְּר֔וּב מִמְשַׁ֖ח הַסּוֹכֵ֑ךְ וּנְתַתִּ֗יךָ בְּהַ֨ר קֹ֤דֶשׁ אֱלֹהִים֙ הָיִ֔יתָ בְּת֥וֹךְ אַבְנֵי־אֵ֖שׁ הִתְהַלָּֽכְתָּ׃
verses.king_james: Thou art the anointed cherub that covereth; and I have set thee so: thou wast upon the holy mountain of God; thou hast walked up and down in the midst of the stones of fire.

verses.latin_vulgate: perfectus in viis tuis a die conditionis tuæ,  donec inventa est iniquitas in te.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: תָּמִ֤ים אַתָּה֙ בִּדְרָכֶ֔יךָ מִיּ֖וֹם הִבָּֽרְאָ֑ךְ עַד־נִמְצָ֥א עַוְלָ֖תָה בָּֽךְ׃
verses.king_james: Thou wast perfect in thy ways from the day that thou wast created, till iniquity was found in thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: In multitudine negotiationis tuæ  repleta sunt interiora tua iniquitate, et peccasti :  et ejeci te de monte Dei,  et perdidi te, o cherub protegens, de medio lapidum ignitorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּרֹ֣ב רְכֻלָּתְךָ֗ מָל֧וּ תוֹכְךָ֛ חָמָ֖ס וַֽתֶּחֱטָ֑א וָאֲחַלֶּלְךָ֩ מֵהַ֨ר אֱלֹהִ֤ים וָֽאַבֶּדְךָ֙ כְּר֣וּב הַסֹּכֵ֔ךְ מִתּ֖וֹךְ אַבְנֵי־אֵֽשׁ׃
verses.king_james: By the multitude of thy merchandise they have filled the midst of thee with violence, and thou hast sinned: therefore I will cast thee as profane out of the mountain of God: and I will destroy thee, O covering cherub, from the midst of the stones of fire.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et elevatum est cor tuum in decore tuo ;  perdidisti sapientiam tuam in decore tuo :  in terram projeci te ;  ante faciem regum dedi te ut cernerent te.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: גָּבַ֤הּ לִבְּךָ֙ בְּיׇפְיֶ֔ךָ שִׁחַ֥תָּ חׇכְמָתְךָ֖ עַל־יִפְעָתֶ֑ךָ עַל־אֶ֣רֶץ הִשְׁלַכְתִּ֗יךָ לִפְנֵ֧י מְלָכִ֛ים נְתַתִּ֖יךָ לְרַ֥אֲוָה בָֽךְ׃
verses.king_james: Thine heart was lifted up because of thy beauty, thou hast corrupted thy wisdom by reason of thy brightness: I will cast thee to the ground, I will lay thee before kings, that they may behold thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: In multitudine iniquitatum tuarum,  et iniquitate negotiationis tuæ,  polluisti sanctificationem tuam :  producam ergo ignem de medio tui, qui comedat te,  et dabo te in cinerem super terram,  in conspectu omnium videntium te.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מֵרֹ֣ב עֲוֺנֶ֗יךָ בְּעֶ֙וֶל֙ רְכֻלָּ֣תְךָ֔ חִלַּ֖לְתָּ מִקְדָּשֶׁ֑יךָ וָאוֹצִא־אֵ֤שׁ מִתּֽוֹכְךָ֙ הִ֣יא אֲכָלַ֔תְךָ וָאֶתֶּנְךָ֤ לְאֵ֙פֶר֙ עַל־הָאָ֔רֶץ לְעֵינֵ֖י כׇּל־רֹאֶֽיךָ׃
verses.king_james: Thou hast defiled thy sanctuaries by the multitude of thine iniquities, by the iniquity of thy traffick; therefore will I bring forth a fire from the midst of thee, it shall devour thee, and I will bring thee to ashes upon the earth in the sight of all them that behold thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: Omnes qui viderint te in gentibus, obstupescent super te :  nihili factus es, et non eris in perpetuum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כׇּל־יֽוֹדְעֶ֙יךָ֙ בָּֽעַמִּ֔ים שָׁמְמ֖וּ עָלֶ֑יךָ בַּלָּה֣וֹת הָיִ֔יתָ וְאֵינְךָ֖ עַד־עוֹלָֽם׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: All they that know thee among the people shall be astonished at thee: thou shalt be a terror, and never shalt thou be any more.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et factus est sermo Domini ad me, dicens :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִ֥י דְבַר־יְהֹוָ֖ה אֵלַ֥י לֵאמֹֽר׃
verses.king_james: Again the word of the Lord came unto me, saying,

verses.latin_vulgate: Fili hominis, pone faciem tuam contra Sidonem, et prophetabis de ea :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בֶּן־אָדָ֕ם שִׂ֥ים פָּנֶ֖יךָ אֶל־צִיד֑וֹן וְהִנָּבֵ֖א עָלֶֽיהָ׃
verses.king_james: Son of man, set thy face against Zidon, and prophesy against it,

verses.latin_vulgate: et dices :   Hæc dicit Dominus Deus :  Ecce ego ad te, Sidon,  et glorificabor in medio tui :  et scient quia ego Dominus,  cum fecero in ea judicia,  et sanctificatus fuero in ea.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאָמַרְתָּ֗ כֹּ֤ה אָמַר֙ אֲדֹנָ֣י יֱהֹוִ֔ה הִנְנִ֤י עָלַ֙יִךְ֙ צִיד֔וֹן וְנִכְבַּדְתִּ֖י בְּתוֹכֵ֑ךְ וְֽיָדְע֞וּ כִּֽי־אֲנִ֣י יְהֹוָ֗ה בַּעֲשׂ֥וֹתִי בָ֛הּ שְׁפָטִ֖ים וְנִקְדַּ֥שְׁתִּי בָֽהּ׃
verses.king_james: And say, Thus saith the Lord God; Behold, I am against thee, O Zidon; and I will be glorified in the midst of thee: and they shall know that I am the Lord, when I shall have executed judgments in her, and shall be sanctified in her.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et immittam ei pestilentiam,  et sanguinem in plateis ejus :  et corruent interfecti in medio ejus gladio per circuitum,  et scient quia ego Dominus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְשִׁלַּחְתִּי־בָ֞הּ דֶּ֤בֶר וָדָם֙ בְּח֣וּצוֹתֶ֔יהָ וְנִפְלַ֤ל חָלָל֙ בְּתוֹכָ֔הּ בְּחֶ֥רֶב עָלֶ֖יהָ מִסָּבִ֑יב וְיָדְע֖וּ כִּי־אֲנִ֥י יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.king_james: For I will send into her pestilence, and blood into her streets; and the wounded shall be judged in the midst of her by the sword upon her on every side; and they shall know that I am the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et non erit ultra domui Israël offendiculum amaritudinis,  et spina dolorem inferens undique  per circuitum eorum qui adversantur eis :  et scient quia ego Dominus Deus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְלֹא־יִהְיֶ֨ה ע֜וֹד לְבֵ֣ית יִשְׂרָאֵ֗ל סִלּ֤וֹן מַמְאִיר֙ וְק֣וֹץ מַכְאִ֔ב מִכֹּל֙ סְבִ֣יבֹתָ֔ם הַשָּׁאטִ֖ים אוֹתָ֑ם וְיָ֣דְע֔וּ כִּ֥י אֲנִ֖י אֲדֹנָ֥י יֱהֹוִֽה׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: And there shall be no more a pricking brier unto the house of Israel, nor any grieving thorn of all that are round about them, that despised them; and they shall know that I am the Lord God.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hæc dicit Dominus Deus :  Quando congregavero domum Israël  de populis in quibus dispersi sunt,  sanctificabor in eis coram gentibus :  et habitabunt in terra sua,  quam dedi servo meo Jacob :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כֹּה־אָמַר֮ אֲדֹנָ֣י יֱהֹוִה֒ בְּקַבְּצִ֣י ׀ אֶת־בֵּ֣ית יִשְׂרָאֵ֗ל מִן־הָֽעַמִּים֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר נָפֹ֣צוּ בָ֔ם וְנִקְדַּ֥שְׁתִּי בָ֖ם לְעֵינֵ֣י הַגּוֹיִ֑ם וְיָֽשְׁבוּ֙ עַל־אַדְמָתָ֔ם אֲשֶׁ֥ר נָתַ֖תִּי לְעַבְדִּ֥י לְיַעֲקֹֽב׃
verses.king_james: Thus saith the Lord God; When I shall have gathered the house of Israel from the people among whom they are scattered, and shall be sanctified in them in the sight of the heathen, then shall they dwell in their land that I have given to my servant Jacob.

verses.latin_vulgate: et habitabunt in ea securi,  et ædificabunt domos, et plantabunt vineas,  et habitabunt confidenter,  cum fecero judicia in omnibus qui adversantur eis per circuitum :  et scient quia ego Dominus Deus eorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְיָשְׁב֣וּ עָלֶ֘יהָ֮ לָבֶ֒טַח֒ וּבָנ֤וּ בָתִּים֙ וְנָטְע֣וּ כְרָמִ֔ים וְיָשְׁב֖וּ לָבֶ֑טַח בַּעֲשׂוֹתִ֣י שְׁפָטִ֗ים בְּכֹ֨ל הַשָּׁאטִ֤ים אֹתָם֙ מִסְּבִ֣יבוֹתָ֔ם וְיָ֣דְע֔וּ כִּ֛י אֲנִ֥י יְהֹוָ֖ה אֱלֹהֵיהֶֽם׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: And they shall dwell safely therein, and shall build houses, and plant vineyards; yea, they shall dwell with confidence, when I have executed judgments upon all those that despise them round about them; and they shall know that I am the Lord their God.
